label: Loss of generativity — system stops producing novel structures
Fragmentation — parts do not fit together or refer to different domains
Collapse into triviality — system becomes vacuous, empty, or meaningless
Loss of differentiation — everything becomes indistinguishable
Loss of persistence — system ceases to exist or maintain structure
Contradiction / inconsistency — internal conflict destroys coherence
Loss of recoverability — perturbation is permanent, no return to viability
Runaway divergence — uncontrolled growth, explosion, or infinite regress
